title: Define Wave 19 manager provider handoff and assignment contract
description: Extend architecture docs with manager provider-candidate discovery, assignment mutation contract, and UI state map for handoff flow.
acceptance_criteria: Contract specifies provider candidate list payload and assignment mutation request/response envelopes
Role and session boundaries are explicit for manager/provider/admin actors
UI state map includes loading, empty candidates, assignment success, conflict, forbidden, and session-expired states
